title: Citrusy Crumbly Mustard Crumble
description: A midnight-craving Portuguese dish featuring citrus, mustard, and poached elements in a whole30-friendly crumble.

ingredients.name: 1 cup almond flour
ingredients.notes: For gluten-free option, use coconut flour instead.

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). In a medium bowl, mix almond flour and shredded coconut. If using honey or maple syrup, add it now and stir well.
In a separate pan over medium heat, sauté minced garlic until fragrant, about 2 minutes.
Add lemon and orange juices to the garlic mixture along with mustard and salt. Cook for another minute.
Pour the citrusy mustard mixture into the almond flour bowl. Mix until combined thoroughly.
Press mixture evenly onto a parchment-lined baking sheet or directly on a cookie tray if you prefer a crumbly texture. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
